pdf_verbatim: 8.1 RELATING GROUPS OF RECORDS WITHIN A DOMAIN USING THE --GRPID VARIABLE ......428

candidates.md_verbatim: ## 8.1 Relating Groups of Records Within a Domain Using --GRPID
Groups of records can be related by using grouping variables such as --GRPID in IDVAR.
- **Section 8.1**, Relating Groups of Records Within a Domain Using the --GRPID Variable — representing a relationship between a group of records for a given subject within the same domain
- The grouping identifier (--GRPID) variable, used to link related records for a subject within a domain, is explained in Section 8.1, Relating Groups of Records Within a --GRPID Variable.
- The grouping identifier (--GRPID) variable, used to link related records for a subject within a domain, is explained in Section 8.1.
